research_question: Does the LLM capability trajectory exhibit a cumulative symbolic threshold crossing consistent with emergent ability onset?

current_dataset.source: Synthetic data calibrated to Chinchilla/GPT scaling laws
current_dataset.blocking_constraint: Both segments equally short (~30 pts each); series too short overall

densified_dataset.method: Intra-family interpolation on calibrated scaling curves

intermediate_variants.processed/real_family_core.csv: Core families only (GPT + Claude + Llama) — 120 pts
intermediate_variants.processed/real_densified.csv: Extended with consistent benchmark families — 120 pts

contamination_exclusions: Models with known MMLU test set leakage
Fine-tuned models (instruction-tuned OK, task-specific fine-tuned excluded)
Unreproducible benchmark scores (no public model weights)

invariants.proxy_R: Robustness to hard tasks (1 - failure rate)
